ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var txtLower = lower(vars.userText) --- if ((txtLower find "クレーム") != [] or (txtLower find "claim") != [] or (txtLower find "納期遅延") != [] or (txtLower find "delivery_delay") != [] or (txtLower find "苦情") != [] or (txtLower find "complaint") != [] or (txtLower find "届かない") != [] or (txtLower find "届きません") != [] or (txtLower find "遅れ") != [] or (txtLower find "遅延") != [] or (txtLower find "delay") != [] or (txtLower find "late") != [] or (txtLower find "delayed") != [] or (txtLower find "問題") != [] or (txtLower find "トラブル") != [] or (txtLower find "trouble") != [] or (txtLower find "issue") != [] or (txtLower find "怒") != [] or (txtLower find "困っ") != [] or (txtLower find "助け") != []) "handle_delivery_delay_claim" else "unknown"
%dw 2.0 output application/java var matches = vars.userText scan /A\d{3,}/ --- if (!isEmpty(matches)) (matches[0])[0] else null
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.result.messages[0].parts[0].text default "(取得失敗)"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.result.messages[0].parts[0].text default "(取得失敗)"
%dw 2.0 output application/java var matches = vars.delayReason scan /P\d{3,}/ --- if (!isEmpty(matches)) (matches[0])[0] else null
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.result.messages[0].parts[0].text default "(取得失敗)"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.result.messages[0].parts[0].text default "(取得失敗)"

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { jsonrpc: "2.0", id: vars.rpcReq.id, result: { status: { state: "completed" }, messages: [ { role: "agent", parts: [{ kind: "text", text: "## 最終判定 (注文 `" ++ (vars.orderId default "?") ++ "`)

" ++ vars.legalSlaCheck ++ "

" ++ "---

" ++ "### 内訳

" ++ "#### Logistics — 配送ステータス

" ++ vars.shipmentStatus ++ "

" ++ "#### Logistics — 遅延理由

" ++ vars.delayReason ++ "

" ++ "#### Inventory — 入荷予定 (商品 `" ++ (vars.productCode default "?") ++ "`)

" ++ vars.restockEta ++ "

" ++ "#### Legal — SLA判定

" ++ vars.legalSlaCheck ++ "

" ++ "---

" ++ "> **抽出ID**: 注文 `" ++ (vars.orderId default "?") ++ "` → Logistics → 商品 `" ++ (vars.productCode default "?") ++ "` → Inventory → Legal で集約
>
" ++ "> **トレース**: Logistics×2 + Inventory×1 + Legal×1 = **4 calls** (Brokerが裏で処理)" }], messageId: uuid() } ] } }
